human_description_en: where source_url = "https://www.elitigation.sg/gd/s/2026_SGFC_46" sorted by created_at descending

rows.content_text:
13 April 2026

District Judge Goh Zhuo Neng:

Introduction



---table---

---table---
 | YAX
---end-table---


---table---
 | This judgment is subject to final editorial corrections approved by the court and/or redaction pursuant to the publisher’s duty in compliance with the law, for publication in LawNet and/or the Singapore Law Reports.
---end-table---


A. BACKGROUND

B. THE LAW

C. THE EVENTS OF 20 MAY 2025

D. THE EVENTS OF 30 JULY 2025

E. NO NECESSITY TO GRANT ANY OF THE APPLICANT’s APPLICATIONS

F. CONCLUSION
rows.summary: In this District Court decision, District Judge Goh Zhuo Neng dismissed all applications brought by the applicant, YAW, against YAX. The court held that there was no necessity to grant any of the applicant's applications, following an assessment of events occurring on 20 May 2025 and 30 July 2025.

query.sql: select rowid, id, citation, case_name, case_numbers, decision_date, court, subject_tags, source_url, pdf_url, content_text, court_summary, summary, created_at, has_content, has_court_summary, fragment_count, extracted_at, summary_generated_at from judgments where "source_url" = :p0 order by created_at desc limit 2
